2026-04-28T16:06:00.1842434Z Copying '/home/runner/.gitconfig' to '/home/runner/work/_temp/2095e567-f3a9-45ee-b897-b900c4dc08c2/.gitconfig'
2026-04-28T16:06:00.1851469Z Temporarily overriding HOME='/home/runner/work/_temp/2095e567-f3a9-45ee-b897-b900c4dc08c2' before making global git config changes
2026-04-28T16:06:00.1853506Z Adding repository directory to the temporary git global config as a safe directory
2026-04-28T16:06:00.1861145Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/agentic-workflows/agentic-workflows
2026-04-28T16:06:00.1898204Z Removing SSH command configuration
2026-04-28T16:06:00.1907532Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp core\.sshCommand
2026-04-28T16:06:00.1952232Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-04-28T16:06:00.2197063Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-04-28T16:06:00.2204815Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-04-28T16:06:00.2255423Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-04-28T16:06:00.2485879Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-04-28T16:06:00.2495063Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-04-28T16:06:00.2533877Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
